---
title: "05. з—…еӣ гҖҒйӮӘж°”дёҺдј еҸҳ"
subtitle: "Pathogenesis, Pathogenic Factors, and Transmission"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 5
categories: [huangdi-neijing, cultural, omega]
description: "How pathogenic factors, transmission, and disease transformation map to cascading state changes, fold-like correction, and recoverability thresholds."
---

**Chapters:** зҙ й—®29-48, зҙ й—®65, зҒөжһў20-28, зҒөжһў42, зҒөжһў58, зҒөжһў66, зҒөжһў70, зҒөжһў71  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `dynamical systems`, `rate-distortion information theory`

{{< include articles/category_05_pathogenesis_pathogenic_factors_transmission.md >}}

---

[Back to Huangdi Neijing Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
